"'''Admiral Jerjerrod's Testimony'''" is a short dialogue written by [[Greg Gorden]], originally published in the ''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]'' and later archived on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].

==Plot summary==
[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Jerjerrod (admiral)|Jerjerrod]] is interviewed by the [[Procurement Panel/Legends|Procurement Panel of the Senate Naval Subcommittee]]. Senators [[Gopple]] and [[V'troren Tara|V'troren]] question Jerjerrod regarding critiques he has made of the Panel's decisions regarding procurement procedures for the Republic Navy. Jerjerrod's responses maintain and reiterate those criticisms.
